approach: Per-second elapsed ticker in StepTab driven by stepHistory.startedAt, plus an extension-side observer that fires one showInformationMessage per step completion.
last_action: Phase 1 complete — compile clean, 305 tests pass (incl. 11 format + 5 notifier)
decisions: Removed the unused activeStep parameter from generateCompactNav — it had no callers and the derivation now lives in stepHistory.
Made StepCompletionNotifier accept a structural NotifierContext instead of SpecContext so it can observe FeatureWorkflowContext directly.

concerns.note: Pre-commit hook unstages package.json/package-lock.json unconditionally — the new speckit.notifications.stepComplete setting needs to be staged after the hook runs, or /install-local skipped during this PR.

T001.did: Added formatElapsed(ms) with Ns / Mm Ss / Hh Mm branches

T003.did: Preact ElapsedTimer component with 1s interval keyed on startedAt, derives elapsed from Date.now() - startedAt

T004.did: Wired ElapsedTimer into StepTab — renders only when canonicalState=in-flight with live startedAt and no task-percent inProgress

T005.did: NavigationBar runningStepIndex now scans stepHistory for startedAt && !completedAt rather than the hardcoded-null activeStep field

T006.did: Mirrored stepHistory-based derivation in html/navigation.ts; added static elapsed placeholder span; dropped unused activeStep param and StepName/isStepCompleted imports since generateCompactNav had no other callers
concerns: Dropped an exported parameter — acceptable only because generateCompactNav wasn't called from anywhere else in the codebase.

T007.did: Added .step-tab__elapsed CSS rule to _navigation.css — muted small text with tabular-nums

T008.did: StepCompletionNotifier class with per-spec seed+dedupe, Open spec action, and speckit.notifications.stepComplete gate

T009.did: 5 tests: seed-on-first-observe silence, one-shot on null→ts transition, dedupe on repeat observes, setting-off silences, per-spec isolation

T010.did: Registered speckit.notifications.stepComplete boolean (default true, window scope) in package.json configuration contributions

T011.did: Instantiated StepCompletionNotifier on SpecViewerProvider; observe() fires before navState post with per-instance lastFeatureCtx; activeStep derived from stepHistory (runningStep tab name); forget() called on panel dispose

T012.did: Added one-sentence note to the sidebar UX paragraph plus a new Step-Complete Notifications configuration subsection

T013.did: Added the elapsed timer element to the working-state row of the Step Tab States table plus a new Elapsed Timer and Completion Notifications subsection

T014.did: Ran npm run compile (clean) and npm test (30 suites, 305 tests, all green)

specify.key_finding: Step lifecycle (startedAt/completedAt) is already written by src/features/specs/stepLifecycle.ts and flows to the webview via stepHistory in navState — no new persistence needed, only a live timer renderer and an in-memory completion detector.

plan.approach_summary: Per-second elapsed ticker in StepTab driven by stepHistory.startedAt, plus an extension-side observer that fires one showInformationMessage per step completion.
risks: Stale lastCtx on webview re-mount — store per-instance and seed on first observe call
Timer drift / idle CPU — one cleared interval per running timer, compute elapsed from Date.now() - startedAt
Writer races between .sdd.json and .spec-context.json — notifier reads only the in-hand post-update context, no extra disk reads
